case_title: BEN ROSENFELD VS. KONICA MINOLTA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENFELD, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT KONICA MINOLTA, INC. DBA KONICA MINOLTA BUSINESS SOLUTIONS U.S.A., INC. CITY GROUP, INC. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-23-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST BEN ROSENFELD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-10-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-31-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-10-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-23-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE REQUEST TO VACATE MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-10-2017 IMPOSED AGAINST BEN ROSENFELD
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60260478)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-07-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
